ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's geographical center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's geographical center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the region belongs to */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code of the region */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the region */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Governor of the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_regions" (
  "sub_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-region */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the sub-region belongs to */,
  "sub_region_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-region */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code of the sub-region */,
  "mayor" TEXT /* Mayor of the sub-region */,
  "sub_region_type" TEXT /* Type of the sub-region (e.g., city, town, village) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population statistic */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "sub_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Urban population count */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Rural population count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_statistics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_statistics_sub_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_region_id") REFERENCES sub_regions ("sub_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each epidemiological data record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "sub_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-region */,
  "case_count" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "death_count" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed deaths */,
  "cases_per_100k" REAL /* Cases per 100,000 population */,
  "deaths_per_m" REAL /* Deaths per million population */,
  "cfr" REAL /* Case Fatality Rate (CFR) */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "disease_type" TEXT /* Type of disease (e.g., COVID-19, influenza) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_sub_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_region_id") REFERENCES sub_regions ("sub_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_quality_rating" REAL /* Data quality rating of the source (e.g., 0-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data update */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the epidemiological data record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the data was updated */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., new data, correction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "sub_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-region */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the health indicator */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the health indicator */,
  "indicator_year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_sub_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_region_id") REFERENCES sub_regions ("sub_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., epidemiologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epidemiological data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., IP address, geographic location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality log */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epidemiological data being checked */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., inconsistency, missing data) */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "viz_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epidemiological data used in the visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "viz_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epidemiological data being exported */,
  "export_type" TEXT /* Type of export (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date the data was exported */,
  "exported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "export_location" TEXT /* Location where the data was exported (e.g., local machine, cloud storage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_exported_by FOREIGN KEY ("exported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_data, edit_data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epidemiological data that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed data */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id")
)
